foundryvtt-live-translator.settings.serv: Path exposed by the companion reverse proxy. Keep the default `/live-translator` unless you changed the proxy config.
foundryvtt-live-translator.settings.targ: Target language code such as KO, EN-US, or JA.
foundryvtt-live-translator.settings.sour: Optional source language code. Leave blank for auto-detect.
foundryvtt-live-translator.errors.missin: Set the FoundryVTT Live Translator service path in module settings first.
foundryvtt-live-translator.errors.nothin: This item has no name or description to translate.
foundryvtt-live-translator.errors.unknow: Translation failed for an unknown reason.
foundryvtt-live-translator.dialog.title: {itemName} Translation
foundryvtt-live-translator.dialog.name: Translated Name
